title: Origins: Immortal Witch
description: A powerful witch who have the power of creation and destroy.
body:
For this to work, you need the Origins Mod. You can choose a different character to become your origin to experience Minecraft.

This Origin is Coded in 1.10.0 of origin, so for other versions or forge version, there may having bugs that not expected.

# Immortal Witch
## A powerful witch who have the power of creation and destroy.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3efd08bc54324ebbc93666a428e2bb9367ef929.png)

### Potion Of Undying
- Any Positive Effects obtained last forever until death, eating nether stars can level up each effect.
<details>
<summary>positive effect list</summary>
"minecraft:speed",
"minecraft:haste",
"minecraft:strength",
"minecraft:jump_boost",
"minecraft:resistance",
"minecraft:fire_resistance",
"minecraft:water_breathing",
"minecraft:invisibility",
"minecraft:night_vision",
"minecraft:health_boost",
"minecraft:luck",
"minecraft:slow_falling",
"minecraft:conduit_power",
"minecraft:dolphins_grace",
"minecraft:hero_of_the_village"
</details>

### Potion Of Karma (Passive Ability)
- Any Negative Effects obtained last for 1 minute longer & seem more deadly
- Instant Damage / Instant Health / Regeneration / Saturation can never be applied on you,

<details>
<summary>negative effect list</summary>
"minecraft:slowness",
"minecraft:mining_fatigue",
"minecraft:nausea",
"minecraft:blindness",
"minecraft:weakness",
"minecraft:poison",
"minecraft:wither",
"minecraft:levitation",
"minecraft:unluck",
"minecraft:darkness"
</details>

### Crunch (Primary Ability)
- Crunch down your status effects. 10 Positive Effects = 10 Absorption Hearts (1:00); 5 Negative Effects = Hunger 5 (0:30).
- Absorption and Hunger can't be Crunch.
### Horde Together Strong (Secondary Ability)
- Bottle Up All effects you have into a splash potion cloud at your target for 1:00. You lose your effects upon use.
### Not a Gym Hitter
- The Immortal witch never hit strength training so they can't hold up a shield or bow
### Overdose Overhaul 
- The Immortal Witch got so many effects it affected their health, they have 3 Less Hearts
### Lazy brewery
- Immortal witch exhausts faster and can only eat Meat.
